exploration_notes:
All five xDS v3 transport protocol components were found under source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/ in envoy v1.31.2:

1. **GrpcSubscriptionImpl** (grpc_subscription_impl.{h,cc}): Adapter from typed Subscription to untyped GrpcMux, handling per-xDS API stats/logging. It delegates to whichever GrpcMux variant is injected.

2. **GrpcMuxImpl** (grpc_mux_impl.{h,cc}, top-level): The SotW (State of the World) ADS implementation using DiscoveryRequest/DiscoveryResponse. Implements GrpcStreamCal
